prompt_identifiers.concept: cinematic character portrait in a neon alley

style_variations.positive_template: A {subject} standing in a neon-lit alley, {lighting}, highly detailed portrait.
style_variations.negative_template: blurry, low quality, deformed hands, extra fingers

style_variations.positive_template: {subject}, neon alley, {lighting}, portrait, highly detailed, sharp focus
{subject}, alley, neon lights, {lighting}, portrait, looking at viewer, detailed face, masterpiece, best quality
style_variations.negative_template: lowres, bad anatomy, bad hands, text, watermark, signature

style_variations.positive_template: ({style_modifier}:1.2), dramatic mountain range at sunset, {camera}, {mood} atmosphere, volumetric clouds, god rays, ultra detailed, 8k resolution
style_variations.negative_template: (worst quality:1.4), (low quality:1.4), (normal quality:1.2), lowres, bad anatomy, bad hands

style_variations.positive_template: (landscape (subject "mountain range") (time "sunset") (camera "{camera}") (mood "{mood}") (style "{style_modifier}") (details "volumetric clouds, god rays, ultra detailed"))
